steps.title: Compare the clustering
steps.content: Standard deviation is smaller when values are closer to the mean. The lists are all centered near $52$, so compare how far the numbers spread from $52$.

steps.title: Find the tightest list
steps.content: The list $51,52,52,52,53$ stays within $1$ unit of $52$. The other lists include values at least $2$ units from $52$, so they are more spread out.

steps.title: Choose the smallest spread
steps.content: The tightest cluster has the smallest standard deviation. The answer is D.
